description: Catalog pointer for PLX company skills. Skill ids are authoritative in the skills repo manifest.json (packages[].skillIds).
notes: petralabx/skills is the canonical company skill content repo; pinSha tracks catalog v1.2.0 (5 operator skills: uat-feedback-batch-fix, uat-weekly-batch-loop, staging-dual-db-migrate, plx-graph-mail, worktree-open-session). legacySourceRepo documents the pre-migration source.
